name: Tangerine Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. Optional: Rinse the hens and pat them dry.
2. In a bowl, combine the wine, soy sauce, salt, honey, and orange juice.
3. Rub 1 tablespoon of butter inside each hen.
4. Sprinkle the cavity with salt.
5. Mix together the onion, garlic, pecans, mushrooms, and tangerines.
6. Stuff each hen with this mixture.
7. Heat the liquid mixture until it begins to boil. Turn off heat and let cool for 5 minutes.
8. Pour 2 tablespoons of the cooled liquid into each hen.
9. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
10. Bake the hens for 45 minutes, basting every 10 minutes with the liquid mixture.
11. Test the birds; if not done, cook until they are thoroughly cooked.
Note: This recipe has also been successfully used on chickens and Guinea hens, as well as quail.
